task: Find Florida internship programs in the Mayo Clinic College of Medicine and Science.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to the official Mayo Clinic College of Medicine & Science Academics program finder, applying the Florida and Internship filters, and extracting the resulting programs. The trajectory shows the filtered page state explicitly: 'Results 1 - 10 of 24 for Florida Internship', then pages 11-20 and 21-24. The final answer lists all 24 internship programs found across the three filtered result pages, and those names/durations/schools are supported by the page snapshots and extracted article data from the official college.mayo.edu site.
final_result_response:
I found 24 Florida internship programs in Mayo Clinic College of Medicine and Science’s Academics program finder. Mayo’s site describes this as a place to “Search and filter” its programs.<citation refs="search_b3d1dc467f5748b3a571e4c31e769715#1">Search and filter our more than 400 programs.</citation>

1. Administrative Internship Program, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
2. Audiology Externship, 1 year, Health Sciences  
3. Biomedical Sciences International Internship, 1 year, Health Sciences  
4. Biostatistics and Data Science Internship Program, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
5. Cardiovascular Medicine Exercise Physiology Internship, 12 weeks, Health Sciences  
6. Cardiovascular Technology Internship, 6 weeks, Health Sciences  
7. Clinical Research Coordinator Internship, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
8. Clinical Research Internship Study Program, 10 weeks, Non-Clinical Education  
9. Convergence Science Internship: Engineering, 16 weeks, Non-Clinical Education  
10. Dietetic Internship, 8 months, Health Sciences  
11. Echocardiography Internship, 6 weeks, Health Sciences  
12. FOUR Stroke Education Internship, 1 year, Non-Clinical Education  
13. Genetic Counseling Internship, 8-10 weeks, Health Sciences  
14. Health Information Management Internship, varies, Health Sciences  
15. Historical Archivist Internship, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
16. Magnetic Resonance Imaging Internship, 5 months, Health Sciences  
17. Mayo Clinic Physics, Chemistry, and Engineering Internship, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
18. Physical or Occupational Therapy Internship, 8-12 weeks, Health Sciences  
19. Public Health Internship Program, 1 semester, Non-Clinical Education  
20. Social Work Internship, 1-2 semesters, Health Sciences  
21. Speech Language Pathology Internship, 1 semester, Health Sciences  
22. Speech Pathology Graduate Internship in Voice and Upper Airway, 1-2 semesters, Health Sciences  
23. Undergraduate Biomedical Research Internship, 2 semesters, Health Sciences  
24. Vascular Interventional Radiologic Technology Internship, 8 months, Health Sciences
action_history: Opening Mayo Clinic website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.mayoclinic.org/');
Opening College programs page: const p2 = await openTab('https://college.mayo.edu/academics/');
Opening next page of filtered results: await page.locator('e171').click();
Opening final page of filtered results: await page.locator('e259').click();
Reading final filtered results: await page.locator('e36').click();
Extracting page 1 result links: await page.getByRole('link', {name:'1'}).first().click();
Extracting page 2 result links: await page.getByRole('link', {name:'2'}).first().click();
